title: APRS-IS: altitude conversion loses precision
description:
File: rust/lichen-gateway/src/aprs_is.rs
Line: 141

The altitude conversion from decimeters to feet uses integer arithmetic:
  (self.alt_dm as i32 * 328084) / 1_000_000

This loses precision. For alt_dm = 1 (0.1 meters), the result is 328084 / 1000000 = 0 feet instead of 0.328 feet.

While APRS position reports typically use whole feet, this could accumulate errors for low altitudes. Consider using: ((self.alt_dm as i64 * 328084 + 500000) / 1_000_000) as i32 for rounding, or document that sub-foot precision is intentionally lost.
